name: Bulk File Renamer Pro
shortDescription: Bulk Renamer Pro is a powerful file renaming utility that helps users rename multiple files quickly and efficiently across folders and subfolders. It allows batch replacement, removal, and addition of text in file names, and can also move renamed files to another folder automatically, saving time and eliminating repetitive manual work.
keybenefit: Bulk Renamer Pro works completely on your local computer, so your files and folder details remain private and secure. Unlike online renaming tools, there is no need to upload sensitive file information to external websites.
features: Rename multiple files in folders and subfolders
Replace specific text in file names with new text
Remove unwanted text or strings from file names
Add prefixes or suffixes to file names
Move renamed files to another folder automatically
Supports bulk processing for large numbers of files
Works completely offline for enhanced privacy and security
No uploading of file information to external servers
Saves time by automating repetitive file renaming tasks

faq.a: No. This is a premium utility
Yes. Internet is not required after download.
